notes.R2_ACCOUNT_ID: Prefer repository variable; can fallback to secret.
notes.R2_BUCKET: Prefer repository variable; can fallback to secret.
notes.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID: R2 S3 access key. Prefer secret.
notes.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY: R2 S3 secret key. Prefer secret.
notes.APK_REPO_SIGNING_KEY_B64: Base64-encoded private key stored as repository secret and used when SIGN_REPO_INDEX=1.
notes.APK_REPO_SIGNING_KEY_PUBLIC_NAME: Optional key name passed to abuild-sign -p.
notes.TRUSTED_APK_KEYS_DIR: Optional path to trusted APK public key directory (default trusted/apk-keys).
